response_text:
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_date : date
ATTR arrival_date : date
ATTR scheduled_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_code
PK status_date_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date_time : timestamp : PK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar
ATTR surname : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code
PK crew_code
ATTR role : varchar
ATTR assignment_date : date

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_code
ATTR belt_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_code : varchar : FK

REL Airline -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=airline_code
REL Airport -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Airport -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Airport -> BaggageBelt : 1 -> 0..N : FK=airport_code
REL Airplane -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_code
REL CrewMember -> CrewAssignment : 1 -> 1..N : FK=crew_code
REL Flight -> CrewAssignment : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_code
